headline: TSMC 2nm Ramp And AI Demand Reframe Growth And Valuation Narrative
summary: TSMC (NYSE:TSM) has started production of its next generation 2nm chips, marking a new step in advanced semiconductor manufacturing. The move comes alongside record demand for AI chips from major customers such as NVIDIA and Apple. The company has raised its long term growth outlook as AI related orders and 2nm capacity ramp shape its business mix. TSMC is the leading pure play foundry serving global chip designers, and its 2nm technology is set to sit at the core of future AI, data center...

headline: Big Tech Stocks Rout Is Flashing Signals of a Turnaround
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The wreckage in large technology stocks that sent the Nasdaq 100 Index into a correction is flashing signs that have marked turning points for the group in the past.Chief among the signals is how much of Big Tech’s valuation premium to the rest of the market has been erased. Such a compression has historically set the sector up for outperformance.After an 11% slide from its last record in October, the tech-focused gauge now trades at 21 times projected 12-month earnings, just 1.7
